name: Optimize LLGo compilation and CI speed

description: baseline ci subset after rebasing current branch onto goplus/main; cl package currently fails in local environment

asi.hypothesis: Establish baseline for representative Go test CI subset covering internal build/crosscompile/goembed and cl compiler tests after updating branch to latest goplus/main.
asi.error_details: go test ./cl failed after ~260s; output shows package foo dump and FAIL github.com/goplus/llgo/cl.
asi.rollback_reason: Baseline command failed; no code changes to evaluate.
asi.next_action_hint: Use a stable, faster benchmark subset first (build/test packages that pass locally), then separately investigate cl failure if needed.

name: Optimize LLGo stable core build/CI subset

description: baseline stable core CI subset after rebasing current branch onto latest goplus/main

asi.hypothesis: Use a stable locally passing subset of CI that exercises LLGo build orchestration, crosscompile helpers, and goembed tests as the primary optimization benchmark.

description: profiling internal/build test timings without code changes

asi.hypothesis: Measure per-test elapsed times to identify slow core CI cases before optimizing.
asi.rollback_reason: No improvement; profiling-only rerun was slower than baseline due to noise/JSON overhead.
asi.next_action_hint: Inspect slow tests for redundant llgo builds/runs and opportunities to reuse setup or avoid unnecessary rebuilds.

description: profiled isolated TestTest to see compile hotspots

asi.hypothesis: CPU profile of the slowest internal/build test can reveal product compile hot spots relevant to CI speed.
asi.profile_summary: Isolated TestTest passed in 11.8s including profile overhead; sampled CPU mostly in clang/LLVM and llgo cl compileInstr paths, suggesting wall time includes external toolchain work and repeated integration builds.
asi.rollback_reason: Profiling-only run is not comparable to core benchmark and does not improve baseline.
asi.next_action_hint: Prefer reducing redundant integration test builds or improving build cache reuse; CPU micro-optimizations are less obvious from this profile.
